_note: Catalog-side descriptor-provenance scaffold (35-04, RESEARCH Q3) -- NOT the authoritative snapshot pin. The source-of-truth OpenTabs pin lives at vendor/opentabs-snapshot/_provenance.json; the source/repo/sha/license/pinnedAt fields below record which vendor snapshot this catalog scaffold was seeded from (they intentionally MATCH the vendor pin's SHA), but they are not a second pin to bump by hand -- update the vendor pin, then re-seed this. Phase 36 extends THIS file with per-descriptor provenance (which emitted descriptor came from which upstream app) via the apps[] array.
